Pages & Metrics

### A. Overview
**Purpose:** At-a-glance market snapshot

**KPI Cards (top row):**
- Total Impressions, Total Views, Total Engagement
- Total Posts, Avg Engagement Rate
- Market Size (impressions)

**SOV Chart:** Horizontal stacked bar — brand share of impressions per network

**Network Distribution:** Donut chart (YT/FB/TT share)

**Quick Insights:** Auto-generated text cards
- "Vinamilk dominates with 34% SOV across all channels"
- "TH True Milk grew 12% vs previous period"
- "YouTube generates 2x more impressions than TikTok"

### B. Rankings
**Purpose:** Understand competitive positioning

**SOV Matrix:** Brand × Network table showing impression share %

**SOS Matrix:** Share of Shift — period-over-period SOV change

**Ranking Table:** Brands ranked by:
- Impressions (with SOV %)
- Views (with SOV %)
- Engagement
- Engagement Rate

**Filters:** By network, by period
**Sparklines:** Mini trend line in each row

### C. Channel Performance
**Purpose:** Deep-dive into each network

**Tabbed view:** YouTube | Facebook | TikTok

**Per-channel KPIs:**
- Impressions, Views, Engagement, ER
- Posts count, Avg per post
- Format mix (stacked bar)

**YouTube-specific:**
- Duration vs ER scatter/line chart

**Posting Cadence:** Posts per month by brand (line chart)

### D. Content Strategy
**Purpose:** What content formats and topics work

**Format Performance:** Bar chart — which formats (Long Video/Short/Reel/Story) perform best by network

**Top Keywords:** Word frequency bar chart (from post messages)

**Top Posts Table:** Top 20 posts by engagement with:
- Brand, Profile, Network, Format
- Views, Engagement, ER, Date
- Link to original post

### E. Benchmark
**Purpose:** Head-to-head competitor comparison

**Select brand + 1-4 competitors**

**Radar Chart:** Multi-axis comparison:
- Impressions, Views, ER, Posting Cadence, Format Diversity

**Head-to-head Bar Chart:** Side-by-side KPIs

**Gap Analysis:** Which dimensions a brand underperforms vs competitors

### F. Trends
**Purpose:** Time-series analysis

**Line Charts:** Impressions, Views, Engagement over time

**Compare mode:** Overlay multiple brands/networks

**Seasonality:** Highlight peaks (Tết, summer, back-to-school)

**Anomaly detection:** Posts with unusual performance
